headline: How Q4 Beats And Guidance Debates Are Reframing The Omda (OB:OMDA) Investment Story
summary: Omda’s Fair Value price target has been reaffirmed at NOK 59.0, keeping the core valuation anchor steady despite recent tweaks to the underlying model. That stability comes as analysts weigh Q4 revenue and EBITDA beats and strong program momentum against concerns around Healthcare Information Technology valuation pressure and client concentration. As you read on, you will see how these data points and opinions are shaping the evolving narrative around Omda and what to watch next. Analyst...

headline: S&P 500: Morgan Stanley says ’we’re closer to the end of this rolling correction’
summary: Investing.com -- The S&P 500 may be nearing the latter stages of its recent turbulence, according to Morgan Stanley’s Michael Wilson, who wrote in a note Monday that “we think we’re closer to the end of this rolling correction than the beginning.”

headline: Morgan Stanley Job Cuts Test Cost Efficiency And Long Term Growth Plan
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) is cutting about 2,500 jobs, around 3% of its global workforce, as part of a broad restructuring. The layoffs affect investment banking, wealth management, and investment management, with a focus on support functions rather than financial advisors. The move comes as the bank reports strong financial results while aiming for greater efficiency and operational flexibility. For you as an investor, this matters because Morgan Stanley is a major global player across...
